description: A vulnerability was found in SourceCodester Best House Rental Management System 1.0. Impacted is the function save_house of the file /admin_class.php. Performing manipulation of the argument house_no results in sql injection. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been made public and could be used.
